title: Google Play Store Subscriptions Class Action Settlement
description: Settlement for users who paid for at least one renewal term of a Google subscription sold through the Google Play Store between May 30, 2014 and October 27, 2019.

qualifying_questions.text: Did you pay for at least one renewal of a Google Play Store subscription during this period?

title: RevitaLash / RevitaBrow Serum Class Action Settlement
description: Settlement for purchasers of RevitaLash or RevitaBrow eyelash and eyebrow serums in the U.S. between January 1, 2017 and December 29, 2025 (Rush v. Athena Cosmetics). See official site for eligibility.

title: Sirius XM TCPA / Do Not Call Class Action Settlement
description: Proposed settlement for consumers who received more than one telemarketing call from Sirius XM within a 12-month period between April 27, 2019 and October 31, 2025 while on a do-not-call list (Campbell et al. v. Sirius XM Radio Inc.). See official notice for eligibility.

title: Comcast / Xfinity Data Breach Class Action Settlement
description: Settlement for U.S. residents notified of the October 2023 Comcast data breach (Hasson v. Comcast, et al.). See official site for class definition and claim options.
